name: exec-recruiter
description: Personal executive recruiter for Product Leadership opportunities. Daily sourcing across LinkedIn AND major ATS domains (Greenhouse, Lever, Workday, Ashby, etc.) via Google site: search, fit-scored triage, JD-tailored CV generation, contact-aware outreach drafts, approval-gated sends, and a rich live dashboard with cohort views, score histogram, domain breakdown, follow-up tracker, and inbound-signal detection.
